summary: This role is a strong match for your preference for predictable daytime hours and protocol-driven tasks, offering exceptional stability without the burden of on-call or night shifts. While the procedural nature of the work suits your strengths, the high patient volume and requirement for basic mathematical calculations may challenge your specific weaknesses in pace and math. Overall, the lack of emergency pressure and the high level of physician oversight make this a sustainable and recommended career path for your long-term wellbeing.
